settings.heading: Where is it made?
settings.content: Using Nano-Crystalline technology, Bleame™ Crystal Hair Eraser allows the hair to clump and break from the surface when rubbed gently on the skin. This process also helps exfoliate, revealing baby smooth skin after use 💜

settings.heading: Description
settings.content:
Support your stress response and overall well-being with MaryRuth Organics' Organic Ashwagandha Root Liquid Drops. This traditional adaptogenic herb, used for centuries in Ayurveda, helps promote a sense of calm, supports a balanced mood, and may enhance energy and focus.

Crafted with organic ashwagandha root extract in a convenient liquid form, it’s easy to take—just a few drops daily. Made without alcohol or artificial ingredients, this vegan and non-GMO formula fits seamlessly into your natural wellness routine.

settings.heading: How it works
settings.content:
Ashwagandha Root (Withania somnifera), has been used in traditional Ayurveda for centuries. 

  • An important traditional use of this herb is as a nervine — one of a group of plants that are traditionally known to have a soothing and supporting effect on the mind and nervous system. 
  • In addition to its traditional use, ashwagandha has been found to be an adaptogen that may help to support healthy stress levels and support the body’s natural homeostasis. 
  • Let yourself relax and feel great with this long-used herb!

settings.heading: How to take
settings.content:
Suggested Use: Shake well before use. Take up to 15 drops (0.5 mL) 1 to 3 times a day, or as recommended by a physician or healthcare professional. Can be taken directly by mouth or added to water.

 Please avoid direct dropper contact to the skin or mouth in order to prevent product contamination and damage to the dropper.

 

Keep out of reach of children in case of accidental overdose or choking.

settings.heading: Instructions
settings.content:
Prep Your Skin

Exfoliate your skin no less than 24 hours before use. If you have sensitive skin, exfoliate no less than 48 hours before use.

Patch Test for Sensitivity

Conduct a patch test on a small area of each leg: one with damp skin and the other with dry skin. Test with moisture barriers like hypoallergenic moisturizer or cream. Allow it to fully absorb before using your Eraser. For added comfort, test with a protective layer of shaving gel or cream.

Get to action

After a successful patch test, treat your desired areas using the method and technique that felt most comfortable during testing. Start with gentle, circular motions and light pressure. Adjust your technique as needed, avoiding excessive pressure that may cause irritation. Take breaks between passes and use shorter strokes to minimize friction and heat.

Aftercare for Soothing Relief

Rinse the treated area with cool water and gently pat it dry, avoiding rubbing. Apply a fragrance-free, hypoallergenic moisturizer. For an extra relief, use a cold compress for 10-15 minutes.

Caring for Your Eraser

After each use, rinse your Crystal Hair Eraser under running water to remove hair and exfoliated skin. Store the eraser in a cool, dry place, away from direct sunlight and humidity.
Important Note: If you experience any discomfort or irritation during or after use, discontinue use immediately. Visit our Help Center for more information.

settings.heading: Return & Refund Policy
settings.content:
1.1 Return Due To Change Of Mind

We will happily accept returns due to change of mind as long as a request to return is received by us within 72 hours of receipt of item. 

Once approved, refunds will be processed to their original payment method. We will notify you once this has been completed through email.

We will refund the value of the goods returned but will NOT refund the value of any shipping paid.

1.2 Cancellations

If you change your mind before a tracking numbers has been generated, we are able to accept cancellations at any time before the order has been dispatched. If an order has already been dispatched, please refer to our refund policy.

settings.faq-ques: When will I feel the effects?
settings.faq-content: Some people notice calming effects within a few days, while others may need consistent use for 2–3 weeks for full benefits.

settings.faq-ques: Can I take this at night for sleep?
settings.faq-content: Yes! Many users take it in the evening to help relax and improve sleep quality. It’s non-drowsy and naturally calming.

settings.faq-ques: Is it safe for long-term use?
settings.faq-content: For most healthy adults, yes. However, it's best to take breaks every few months and consult your healthcare provider if using long-term.

settings.faq-ques: Can I take it with other supplements or medications?
settings.faq-content: Consult your doctor if you’re on medications (especially for thyroid, blood pressure, or anxiety) or taking other herbal supplements.

settings.faq-ques: Does it contain alcohol or artificial ingredients?
settings.faq-content: No. It’s alcohol-free, vegan, non-GMO, and made with organic glycerin and purified water—no additives or artificial preservatives.
